  "findings": [
    "Severe honeycomb voids in concrete structure due to inadequate consolidation/missed vibration",
    "Exposed aggregate and potential reinforcement exposure reducing structural integrity and durability"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform non-destructive testing (NDT) such as ultrasonic pulse velocity or hammer sounding to map the extent of the voids",
    "Consult structural engineer of record to determine if structural capacity is compromised",
    "Chop out loose concrete to sound substrate, clean reinforcement, and patch with approved high-strength non-shrink repair mortar in accordance with ACI 301"
  ],
  "rationale": "Honeycomb from missed vibration is a major consolidation failure. In an in-service commercial asset, this defect compromises the compressive strength, durability, and reinforcement protection of the concrete, violating ACI 301 and ACI 304 consolidation requirements.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301 Specifications for Structural Concrete",
    "ACI 304R Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete"
  ]
}
